case_title: ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. KEN YIP et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YIP, KEN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-28-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-13-2007
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON NOV-20-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-11-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-28-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-11-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DONALD B. SERAFANO, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-11-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-26-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA, CSR#11935. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-11-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-12-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
